alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing phosphonic acid ester functional group,  with the general structure ROP(=O)OH (R = organyl group).
alternative_parents.name: Phosphonic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds comprising the hydroxylamine functional group, with the general structure R1ON(R2)R3 (R1,R3=H, organyl; R2 = organyl).
alternative_parents.name: N-organohydroxylamines

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acids containing exactly one carboxyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Monocarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a carboxylic acid group with the formula -C(=O)OH.
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the phosphorus atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organophosphorus compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a carbonyl group, with the general structure RC(=O)R', where R=organyl, R'=H, N, O, organyl group or halide group.
alternative_parents.name: Carbonyl compounds

class.description: Organic compounds containing phosphonic acid or a derivative thereof.
class.name: Organic phosphonic acids and derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as dialkyl alkylphosphonates. These are compounds containing a phosphonic acid that is diesterified with alkyl groups, and the phosphorus atom is also directly attached to an alkyl group.

direct_parent.description: Compounds containing a phosphonic acid that is diesterified with alkyl groups, and the phosphorus atom is also directly attached to an alkyl group.
direct_parent.name: Dialkyl alkylphosphonates

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organophosphorus compounds containing a diester derivative of phosphonic acid, with the general structure ROP(=O)OR' (R,R' = organyl group).
subclass.name: Phosphonic acid diesters

superclass.description: Compounds an organic acid or a derivative thereof.
superclass.name: Organic acids and derivatives
